retry_reason: The operation is unconditional (when sk is non-NULL) and always succeeds; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This function is a put-wrapper that releases a BNEP socket. It unlinks the socket from the global list (which drops one reference) and calls sock_put (which drops a second reference), ensuring the socket is fully released. The socket is also orphaning to detach it from the file descriptor. After this function returns, the socket must not be used again and no further puts should be called. This function always succeeds and is typically invoked during socket closure.
